headline: From Bill Gates to Tim Cook: 7 Iconic CEOs Who Chose Executive Chair Over Retirement
summary: Iconic founders and long-tenured CEOs rarely walk away entirely. They migrate to the executive chairperson seat, retaining board voting power, equity alignment, and strategic influence. The pattern signals whether a handoff is clean and time-boxed or whether it carries shadow-CEO risk and strategic drift. Here is how seven landmark transitions compare. 7. Bill Gates, Microsoft ... From Bill Gates to Tim Cook: 7 Iconic CEOs Who Chose Executive Chair Over Retirement
